scripts.dev: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next-dev',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && node --localstorage-file=.node-localstorage ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev --turbopack
scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && node --localstorage-file=.node-localstorage ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
